contact_captcha_disabled_by_turnstile: Contact CAPTCHA is disabled because Turnstile is turned off in Integrations.
contact_captcha_disabled_by_turnstile_to: Configure anti-spam first in the Integrations tab.
contact_captcha_enabled_hint: Requires Turnstile to be configured in Integrations.
contact_notification_email_hint: Optional. If empty, FlatCMS uses the form recipient or site email.
contact_notification_enabled: Enable email notification on Contact submissions
contact_notification_enabled_hint: Sends an email when a Contact message is received in the inbox.
date_format_hint: Use a PHP date() format (e.g. Y-m-d, d/m/Y).
default_language_admin_hint: This setting does not change the personal language selected by each administrator in their profile.
default_language_hint: Language used for new sessions and URLs without prefix.
guided_tour_enabled_hint: Automatically starts the guided tour for accounts that have not completed it yet.
guided_tour_start_hint: Use these actions to replay the tour now or re-enable automatic launch later.
homepage_canonical_hint: When a page is used as the homepage, its /page/... URL redirects to the site root.
homepage_mode_hint: Choose between the native theme homepage and a published page served on the root URL.
homepage_page_hint: Only published source pages are listed. The displayed translation will follow the active frontend locale automatically.
llms_scope_public: - Public published pages and blog posts may be indexed, summarized, and cited.
llms_scope_canonical: - Prefer canonical localized URLs exposed through the sitemap.
llms_access_private: - Do not access admin, login, install, data, storage, or config paths.
integrations_chatbot_enabled_hint: Quickly enables the frontend chatbot once the module is connected.
integrations_chatbot_model_hint: Example: gpt-4.1-mini or any compatible model.
integrations_chatbot_welcome_hint: Initial message shown when the conversation starts.
integrations_cookie_require_consent_hint: Useful for GDPR: marketing scripts run only after consent.
integrations_env_save_failed: Unable to save integration variables into .env.local.
integrations_env_save_failed_not_writabl: .env.local is not writable. Check file and directory permissions.
integrations_env_save_failed_write: Unable to access .env.local. Check server permissions and PHP restrictions.
integrations_hint: Configure external services and generate your .env.local automatically.
integrations_analytics_hint: These scripts are delayed until consent when the cookie banner blocks analytics tools.
integrations_matomo_enabled_hint: Loads the Matomo tracker on the frontend.
integrations_matomo_base_url_hint: Example: https://stats.example.com. Do not include /matomo.js or /matomo.php.
integrations_matomo_site_id_hint: Numeric site identifier declared in Matomo.
integrations_google_analytics_enabled_hi: Loads gtag.js and Google Analytics tracking on the frontend.
integrations_openai_api_key_hint: OpenAI secret key used for server-side requests.
integrations_openai_base_url_hint: Leave empty to use the official OpenAI endpoint.
integrations_tinymce_api_key_hint: Key provided by Tiny Cloud for premium services.
integrations_tinymce_enabled_hint: Enables TinyMCE editor when a module requires it.
integrations_turnstile_enabled_hint: Activates Turnstile verification for forms that require anti-spam.
integrations_turnstile_secret_key_hint: Private key used server-side to validate user tokens.
integrations_turnstile_site_key_hint: Public key used in frontend widgets.
integrations_docs_group_ai_intro: Start with the API key and model. The base URL is only useful if you route requests through a compatible proxy or gateway.
integrations_docs_group_analytics_intro: Choose only the analytics provider you actually use and keep the other fields empty. When consent blocking is active, trackers wait until the visitor accepts.
integrations_docs_group_cookies_intro: Enable these options only if you really manage consent on the frontend. Axeptio identifiers are provided by the project dashboard once the banner is published.
integrations_docs_group_editors_intro: These identifiers unlock optional editor or icon services. If you stay on the local defaults, you can leave them empty.
integrations_docs_group_security_intro: Turnstile requires a public site key for the frontend and a secret key for server-side validation. Enable the switch only after both values are saved.
integrations_docs_intro: Use this internal help to understand what each integration field expects before saving credentials.
integrations_docs_locale_notice: Detailed guidance is displayed in :locale because this documentation is not yet available in the current admin language.
logo_media_storage_failed: Unable to create the logo storage directory.
logo_media_too_large: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size.
mail_contact_notifications_hint: Configure automatic notifications and anti-spam for Contact forms.
mail_from_address_hint: Leave empty to use the site email.
mail_smtp_password_hint: Leave empty to keep the current password.
mail_test_hint: Saves settings then sends a test email using the current configuration. If this field is empty, FlatCMS uses the site email.
menu_type_help: Choose the menu system for site navigation.
posts_per_page_hint: Number of posts displayed on blog listing pages.
page_header_enabled_hint: Shows or hides the title banner on public pages and the contact page.
promo_banner_alignment_hint: Aligns both the text and the CTA position inside the banner.
promo_banner_background_color_hint: Main color used by the promotional strip.
promo_banner_cta_label_hint: Leave empty to hide the button.
promo_banner_cta_url_hint: Accepts an absolute URL, a local path, or an anchor.
promo_banner_cta_variant_hint: The button automatically uses the active frontend theme styles.
promo_banner_enabled_hint: Displays a promotional strip above the site topbar.
promo_banner_text_color_hint: Color applied to the text displayed in the banner.
promo_banner_text_hint: Short message displayed above the main navigation.
routing_auto_probe_failed: Pretty URLs could not be confirmed automatically. FlatCMS will keep a safe fallback while checking your server configuration.
routing_last_check_none: No check has been performed yet.
routing_mode_hint: Choose how FlatCMS builds links. Automatic mode prefers pretty URLs when rewrite is available.
routing_pretty_failed_fallback: Pretty URL mode failed on this server. FlatCMS switched back to fallback mode to keep the site accessible.
settings_advanced_actions_hint: Use these actions to force a fresh render during local development.
settings_advanced_diagnostics_hint: Inspect the active environment, asset versioning strategy, and the PHP configuration actually served.
settings_advanced_recommended_hint: For local development, FlatCMS recommends validate_timestamps=1, revalidate_freq=0, and file_update_protection=0.
settings_advanced_subtitle: Inspect the local runtime and purge development caches.
settings_advanced_warning_opcache_unavai: OPCache is not available on this runtime.
settings_help_intro: Start with the general information, then move to content and email, and finish with the system checks.
settings_help_step_content: Content: homepage, promo banner, and publishing rhythm.
settings_help_step_general: General: site name, URL, branding, and guided tour.
settings_help_step_mail: Email: SMTP, notifications, and sender address.
settings_help_step_system: System: diagnostics, write access, and environment status.
settings_subtitle: Configure the global options of your site.
site_branding_save_hint: Translations will be saved with the settings form.
site_branding_translations_hint: The public site name, description and slogan are managed in a dedicated multilingual modal.
site_branding_translations_modal_help: These values are stored in a dedicated JSON file and applied according to the active frontend locale.
site_logo_topbar_size_hint: Compact mode: 36 x 36 px. Rectangular modes: up to 360 x 72 px in the frontend topbar.
site_logo_variant_hint: Choose how FlatCMS displays the logo in the frontend topbar.
site_logo_mode_hint: Choose which logo you are editing. The frontend switches automatically based on the browser preferred mode.
site_media_modal_unavailable: The media library is not available on this page.
site_slogan_hint: Shown below the site name in the frontend header.
site_slogan_placeholder: Your slogan in a few words
topbar_branding_hint: Controls whether the site name and slogan are displayed in the frontend topbar.
site_url_hint: Primary public URL of the site (e.g. https://example.com).
integrations_ai_hint: LTS agent-ready foundation wired strictly to the Responses API. No public chatbot is enabled here.
integrations_ai_issue_missing_api_key: The OpenAI API key is missing.
integrations_ai_issue_missing_model: The default Responses model is empty.
integrations_ai_issue_missing_http_trans: No compatible PHP HTTP transport is available.
integrations_openai_responses_model_hint: Default server-side model used by the LTS AI provider.
integrations_openai_timeout_hint: Maximum duration for a server-side request to OpenAI.
integrations_ai_test_success: OpenAI connection is valid (:provider, model: :model, output: :output).
integrations_ai_test_not_configured: The OpenAI provider is not configured. Check the API key and Responses model.
integrations_ai_test_refusal: The OpenAI provider answered with a refusal: :message
integrations_ai_test_refusal_generic: The provider refused the test request.
ai_error_not_configured: The AI provider is not configured.
ai_error_provider_refusal: The AI provider returned a refusal.
